source_policy: Original starter quests authored for the SW_MMO prototype (overnight C2). Clone Wars-era, 20 BBY Mos Eisley framing; not ported from any read-only source. Objective kinds + reward shape match scripts/rules/quest_model.gd; rewards reuse the economy (credits) + dual-track CP (gameplay). Tunable content, not owner-gated balance. Starter-quest expansion drop (2026-07-03): +8 original quests, additive to the original 4. Flavor-only consultation of C:\SW_MUSH docs/design guides for Mos Eisley tone (read-only, never copied verbatim); no MUSH mission data was ported. target_key values are verified real creature ids in data/creatures_clone_wars.json and zone_id values are verified real zone ids in data/zones_clone_wars.json as of this drop; giver values that are not the generic notice board are verified real NPC ids in data/npcs_clone_wars.json, used for flavor only (quest_model.gd does not validate giver). Second starter-quest expansion drop (2026-07-03): +8 more original quests, additive to the prior 12, bringing the roster to 20 -- rounds out reach_zone coverage to all four loaded zones (adds tatooine.mos_eisley.spaceport), adds new disable target_keys (tymp, spor_crawler, wrix) plus one higher-tier untargeted disable and a higher-tier underworld_thug bounty, and extends the earn_credits ladder to 350 and 800. Same one-way, flavor-only sourcing policy as above; all new target_key/zone_id/giver values re-verified against the current data/creatures_clone_wars.json, data/zones_clone_wars.json, and data/npcs_clone_wars.json.

quests.name: Pest Control
quests.description: The Dune Sea crawls with vermin. Cull three of the beasts prowling the lawless wastes.

quests.name: Into the Dune Sea
quests.description: Scout the lawless Dune Sea beyond the spaceport perimeter. Watch your back out there.

quests.name: Make Your Way
quests.description: Every spacer needs credits. Earn 200 in the field and prove you can hustle on Tatooine.

quests.name: Krayt Bounty
quests.description: A monstrous krayt has been raiding the wastes. The Hutts will pay well for its skull.

quests.name: Canyon Cull
quests.description: Old Brana Nesh keeps her dewback stock at the edge of the Jundland canyons, and canyon womp rat packs have been harrying the herd in relay-shift raids. Thin one of the packs before they run a dewback to ground.

quests.name: Fringe Cleanup
quests.description: Hutt Enforcer Greeshk doesn't care who is working the Spaceport Fringe as long as it's Hutt muscle. Freelance thugs have been leaning on the wrong doors. Convince three of them to find other work.

quests.name: Berry Season
quests.description: The badland shrubs are fruiting, which means the local draagax packs have gone berry-drunk and berserk. Brana Nesh needs the worst of them put down before they reach the stables.

quests.name: Slipped Handler
quests.description: Djas Puhr has a lead on a wild acklay working the badlands south of the Dune Sea, likely a Geonosian arena beast that slipped its handler. He'll pay well for proof of the kill.

quests.name: Something Bigger
quests.description: Djas Puhr has heard a rumor too big to ignore: a rancor loose in the deep desert, too far from Jabba's palace to be the pit beast. If it's real, it's the most dangerous contract on Tatooine. He wants it confirmed, and ended.

quests.name: Count the Stalls
quests.description: Jawa Trade-Elder Ruzz-tha wants a reliable set of eyes in the Market District before the next caravan comes through. Walk the district and report back.

quests.name: Case the Fringe
quests.description: Inspector Haddo wants to know who's moving through the Spaceport Fringe before he decides who owes him a fee. Scout the fringe and report what you see.

quests.name: Bigger Hustle
quests.description: Kayson at the weapon shop isn't impressed by small-time credits. Earn 500 in the field and he'll start treating you like a real customer.

quests.name: Control Tower Rounds
quests.description: Lieutenant Talon logs two hundred movements a day from a console she barely trusts. She wants a set of boots on the actual spaceport floor to confirm the manifests match what's really parked out there. Walk the Mos Eisley Spaceport District and report back.

quests.name: Eastern Gate Nights
quests.description: CT-7041 "Dust" has watched tymp packs get bolder outside the Eastern Gate after dark, tusked and climbing where they shouldn't. He hasn't drawn his rifle in anger yet at this post and would like to keep it that way. Drive off three of them.

quests.name: Something in the Crates
quests.description: Venn Kator found spor crawlers nesting in a shipment of parts crates on the Bay 94 pit floor — finger-length, venomous, and absolutely not something he's touching with his bare hands. Clear them out before someone reaches into the wrong drawer.

quests.name: Honest Work
quests.description: Tova Shenn runs three schemes off the top of the Bay 94 steps and doesn't think much of spacers who can't match her take without bending a single rule. Earn 350 credits clean and she might start pointing marks your way instead of running them herself.

quests.name: Bay 87 Volume
quests.description: Drue upgraded Bay 87's blast doors on inspection-waiver fees alone, and he's precise about what buys a waiver: volume. Move 800 credits through the field and he'll start quoting you his better rate.

quests.name: Keep It Outside
quests.description: Wuher hears everything across the cantina floor and likes almost none of it lately. Word is trouble has been gathering near the entrance again. Clear four of them out before Chalmun has to get up from his booth.

quests.name: House Rules
quests.description: Chalmun's one rule is no trouble for the house, and lately Hutt-linked debt collectors have been leaning on his patrons at the door in defiance of it. He wants a message sent: put down five of the enforcers working the cantina's doorstep.

quests.name: Pack Pressure
quests.description: Brana Nesh has lost sleep to wrix howls circling closer to the stables each night — pack hunters that prey on bantha and dewback alike and don't scatter easy. Thin the pack before they work up the nerve to hit the paddock.
